description_long: This rifle features a futuristic design with a predominantly red body accented by black and blue highlights. The stock is angular and skeletonized, providing a lightweight yet sturdy rear section. The barrel is cylindrical and dark, extending forward from a robust central housing that appears reinforced. Blue glowing elements are embedded along the sides and top, suggesting an energy-based or advanced technological function. The handguard and fore-end are integrated into the main body, with sharp, geometric lines and a layered construction. The overall appearance is aggressive and modern, suitable for a sci-fi or advanced urban combat scenario.
description: A futuristic red and black rifle with blue glowing accents, angular skeletonized stock, and a cylindrical barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, red body, blue glowing accents, and the angular skeletonized stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, wide angular stock, and blue glowing elements on the upper surfaces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same red and black color scheme, blue accents, and the rifle's layered construction.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the skeletonized stock, central housing, and the symmetry of the blue glowing details.
